name: SENTINEL AML/CFT
description: Regulatory-grade AML/CFT compliance intelligence: screen entities against 1.1M+ global watchlist records (OFAC, UN, EU sanctions, PEP, Interpol, World Bank debarment), 159-country jurisdiction risk scoring, compound KYC intelligence, plus 12 live Mauritius economic data feeds. First ERC-8004 trust provider in the x402 ecosystem.
